creator: svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com
text:
Default install munin-cron can't collect data

$ /usr/local/bin/munin-cron
not a reference at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16.2/Munin/Master/Utils.pm line 947.


# cat /var/log/munin/munin-html.log
2013/02/20 20:25:56 [PERL WARNING] Use of uninitialized value in list assignment at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.16.2/Munin/Master/Utils.pm line 134.
